name: rookie-code-vscode
description: Exports active file and selection ranges to Rookie Code agent via .rookie-code/editor-context.json

rookieCode.editorContext.enabled.description: Enable exporting active editor file + selections to .rookie-code/editor-context.json

rookieCode.editorContext.throttleMs.description: Throttle delay (ms) for updating editor-context.json while you move cursor or selection

rookieCode.editorContext.includeCaretLin.description: When there is no selection, export the caret line as a 1-line selection range

rookieCode.editorContext.path.description: Optional override output path for editor-context.json. Default: ~/.rookie-code/editor-context.json
